description: A single video published by a PunkFlow-aligned creator. Represents the canonical metadata record for one piece of video content. Designed for creator-owned video infrastructure: portable, signed, AI-permission-aware, and built around the structural failures of platform-mediated video distribution.

description.description: Long-form description, supports plain text or simple markdown.

videoUrl.description: Canonical URL where the video can be played or fetched. Typically points to an HLS manifest, MP4, or hosted player.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a representative still image for the episode.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio of the video as 'width:height' (e.g. '16:9', '21:9', '9:16').

language.description: Primary language of the episode, as a BCP-47 tag (e.g. 'en', 'en-US', 'ja').

category.description: Primary category for the episode. Open vocabulary, but known values are recommended.

series.description: Series this episode belongs to, if any.

chapters.description: Embedded chapter markers within the episode.

transcriptSegments.description: Structured timestamped transcript. Used for accessibility, search, and semantic indexing.

captions.description: Caption/subtitle file references, typically WebVTT or SRT format.

credits.description: Collaborators and contributors. Each credit may reference an AT Protocol DID, an external URL, or both.

contentWarnings.description: Standardized content warning tags for accessibility and informed viewing.

visibility.description: Discoverability and access level for the episode.

accessModel.description: How viewers can access the episode (free, tip-supported, paid, patron-tier).

publishedAt.description: When the episode was or will be published. May differ from createdAt for scheduled releases.

recordedAt.description: When the source content was originally recorded. May differ from createdAt and publishedAt.

createdAt.description: When this metadata record was created.

license.description: Content license. SPDX identifier preferred; custom URL supported for non-SPDX licenses.

aiPermissions.description: Explicit declarations about how AI systems may interact with this content. Missing fields default to creator-protective values: searchIndexing allowed, all others denied.

disclosures.description: Sponsor, paid promotion, or material connection disclosures, structured for FTC compliance and viewer transparency.

canonStatus.description: For serialized or worldbuilt creative work, the canonical status of this episode within its series.

replaces.description: AT URI of a prior version this episode replaces, if any.

replacementReason.description: Reason this episode replaces a prior version.

labels.description: Self-applied content labels per AT Protocol convention.

name.description: Display name of the series (e.g. 'Child Aurum', 'Simone Pixel', 'Odd Take').

index.description: Sequential episode number within the series.

season.description: Season number, if the series uses seasons.

uri.description: Optional reference to a com.punkflow.video.series record for richer metadata.

start.description: Start time of the chapter, in seconds from the beginning of the episode.

description.description: Optional longer description of the chapter.

start.description: Start time of this segment, in seconds from the beginning of the episode.

duration.description: Duration of this segment in seconds.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for these captions (e.g. 'en', 'es-MX', 'ja').

url.description: URL to the caption file. WebVTT (.vtt) preferred; SRT (.srt) acceptable.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default caption track.

did.description: AT Protocol DID of the contributor, if they are on the network.

url.description: External URL for the contributor (portfolio, social profile, etc.).

note.description: Optional note about this credit (e.g. 'as Beta Bot', 'episode 3 only').

type.description: How viewers can access this episode.

accessUrl.description: URL where viewers can purchase, subscribe, or otherwise gain access for non-free models.

tipUrl.description: URL where viewers can tip the creator, for tip-supported models.

priceHint.description: Human-readable price indication (e.g. '$5', 'pay-what-you-want', 'patron-tier-2'). Not authoritative for transactions.

spdxId.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. 'CC-BY-4.0', 'CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0', 'CC0-1.0', 'MIT'). Use 'all-rights-reserved' for traditional copyright.

url.description: URL to the full license text or a custom license.

aiPermissions.description: Explicit declarations about how AI systems may interact with this content. Default behavior for missing fields: searchIndexing allowed, all others denied.

searchIndexing.description: Allow basic search indexing that drives traffic to the canonical work. Default: allow.

aiSummarization.description: Allow AI-generated summaries that may displace clicks to the original. Default: deny.

semanticEmbedding.description: Allow vector embedding of content for similarity matching beyond direct search lookup. Default: deny.

training.description: Allow use as training data for AI models. Default: deny.

generation.description: Allow use as input for AI generation of derivative content. Default: deny.

excerpting.description: Allow AI extraction of clips, frames, or snippets for use elsewhere. Default: deny.

termsUrl.description: Optional URL to the creator's full AI policy for additional nuance and conditions.

type.description: Type of disclosure for transparency and FTC compliance.

party.description: Name of the sponsoring entity, brand, or party.

startTime.description: Start time in the episode where the disclosed content begins, in seconds.

endTime.description: End time in the episode where the disclosed content ends, in seconds.

url.description: URL related to the disclosure (sponsor's site, affiliate target, etc.).
